user.title: Connect to ESPHome Fleet
user.description: Enter the base URL of your ESPHome Fleet add-on (for example {example_url}) and the shared token from the add-on's Configuration tab.

discovery_confirm.title: Set up {name}
discovery_confirm.description: Home Assistant found an ESPHome Fleet server at {url}. Confirm or edit the URL to finish setup.

reauth_confirm.title: ESPHome Fleet needs a new token
reauth_confirm.description: The add-on at {url} is rejecting requests. Re-enter the shared token from Settings → Add-ons → ESPHome Fleet → Configuration.

reconfigure_confirm.title: Reconfigure ESPHome Fleet
reconfigure_confirm.description: Update the base URL or token for the ESPHome Fleet add-on currently at {url}.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the ESPHome Fleet server at that URL. Check the URL, that the add-on is running, and that this host can reach it.
error.token_required: The add-on token is required. Copy it from Settings → Add-ons → ESPHome Fleet → Configuration.

abort.already_in_progress: Setup is already in progress for this server via Supervisor discovery.
abort.invalid_discovery_info: The Supervisor discovery record was missing host or port.
abort.reauth_successful: The token was updated and the integration reloaded.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The integration was updated and reloaded.
abort.reconfigure_unknown_entry: Couldn't find the integration entry to reconfigure. Try removing and re-adding the integration.

cancel.name: Cancel
cancel.description: Cancel a queued or running compile job.

validate.name: Validate
validate.description: Run ESPHome config validation on a target YAML.

config_entry_reauth.title: ESPHome Fleet needs a new token

init.description: The add-on at {url} is rejecting requests — the shared token may have been rotated. Click **Submit** to open the re-authentication form.

no_config_entry.message: No ESPHome Fleet config entry configured — add the integration first via Settings → Devices & Services.

no_managed_target_in_selection.message: None of the selected devices are managed ESPHome Fleet targets.

no_target_selected.message: Select at least one device or provide a 'targets' list.

no_single_target_selected.message: Select a device or provide a 'target' filename.

invalid_worker_device.message: The selected worker is not an ESPHome Fleet build worker.
